observation_ref.content:
Current terminal state:
New Terminal Output:
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# ls -la /app
total 4
drwxr-xr-x 2 root root  30 Dec 30 18:41 .
drwxr-xr-x 7 root root 125 Dec 30 18:55 ..
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 351 Dec 14 16:03 data.csv
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# head -n 5 /app/data.csv
y,n
0,20
0,20
0,20
0,20
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > /app/hierarchical_model.stan << 'EOF'
> // Hierarchical Beta-Binomial model
> // y_i ~ Binomial(n_i, theta_i)
> // theta_i ~ Beta(alpha, beta)
> // Prior: p(alpha, beta) ∝ (alpha + beta)^(-5/2)
>
> data {
>   int<lower=1> N;              // number of observations
>   int<lower=0> y[N];           // successes
>   int<lower=0> n[N];           // trials
> }
>
> parameters {
>   real<lower=0> alpha;         // hyperparameter alpha > 0
>   real<lower=0> beta;          // hyperparameter beta > 0
>   vector<lower=0, upper=1>[N] theta; // group probabilities
> }
>
> model {
>   // Prior on (alpha, beta): proportional to (alpha + beta)^(-5/2)
>   target += -2.5 * log(alpha + beta);
>
>   // Hierarchical prior for group probabilities
>   theta ~ beta(alpha, beta);
>
>   // Likelihood
>   y ~ binomial(n, theta);
> }
> EOF
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > /app/analysis.R << 'EOF'
> # Analysis script using RStan to fit hierarchical beta-binomial model
> # Defaults follow the recommendation: 4 chains, 100000 iterations per chain, seed = 1
> # You can override iterations for quick tests by setting environment variable ITER
>
> suppressPackageStartupMessages({
>   library(rstan)
> })
>
> # Speed/caching options
> rstan_options(auto_write = TRUE)
> options(mc.cores = max(1L, parallel::detectCores()))
>
> # Read data
> csv_path <- "/app/data.csv"
> if (!file.exists(csv_path)) stop("Data file not found at ", csv_path)
> df <- read.csv(csv_path)
> if (!all(c("y", "n") %in% names(df))) stop("Data must contain columns 'y' and 'n'")
>
> y <- as.integer(df$y)
> n <- as.integer(df$n)
> if (length(y) != length(n)) stop("y and n length mismatch")
> N <- length(y)
>
> stan_data <- list(N = N, y = y, n = n)
>
> # Compile Stan model
> stan_file <- "/app/hierarchical_model.stan"
> if (!file.exists(stan_file)) stop("Stan model file not found at ", stan_file)
> sm <- rstan::stan_model(file = stan_file)
>
> # Iterations: default 100000, allow override via env var ITER for testing
> iter <- as.integer(Sys.getenv("ITER", "100000"))
> if (is.na(iter) || iter <= 0) iter <- 100000L
>
> # Sample
> fit <- rstan::sampling(
>   object = sm,
>   data = stan_data,
>   chains = 4,
>   iter = iter,
>   seed = 1
> )
>
> # Extract posterior means
> post <- rstan::extract(fit, pars = c("alpha", "beta"))
> alpha_mean <- mean(post$alpha)
> beta_mean  <- mean(post$beta)
>
> # Save results
> alpha_out <- "/app/posterior_alpha_mean.txt"
> beta_out  <- "/app/posterior_beta_mean.txt"
>
> writeLines(sprintf("%.10f", alpha_mean), con = alpha_out)
> writeLines(sprintf("%.10f", beta_mean),  con = beta_out)
>
> # Print a brief summary to stdout as well
> cat("Posterior alpha mean:", sprintf("%.10f", alpha_mean), "\n")
> cat("Posterior beta  mean:", sprintf("%.10f", beta_mean),  "\n")
> EOF
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# ls -la /app/hierarchical_model.stan /app/analysis.R
